name: Fire and Ice Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Lean boneless pork roast, cut into 1-inch cubes
4 oz Green chili peppers, canned, drained and diced
1 tbsp Jalapeno peppers, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple, reserving the syrup.
2. In a Dutch oven, cook the pork in hot olive oil until brown, about 5 minutes per side. Remove and set aside.
3. Add more olive oil to the pot if needed, then sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic over medium heat until the onion is tender, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the reserved pineapple syrup, canned tomatoes with their juices, tomato paste, green chili peppers, green pepper, additional onions, remaining garlic cloves, chili powder, cumin, jalapeno peppers, and salt.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and let it simmer for 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally.
6. Add the pineapple chunks and return the pork to the pot. Cover and simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
7. Serve hot, garnished with sliced green onions, and topped with shredded cheddar cheese before serving.
